docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $238.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-21-2001,
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR DAMAGES AND COSTS INCLUDING CONTRACTUAL ATTY FEES FILED BY PLTF
MOTION FOR AMENDED JUDGT FOR DAMAGES & COSTS, INCL ATTY FEES; DECLARATION; POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
WRIT FULLY SATISFIED AS TO POSSESSIONS
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2001 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PROPERTY ALREADY RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF $299.97 RENT, $2,085.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $238.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,622.97, STAYED UNTIL JAN-01-2001, $2,622.97 SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR AMENDED JUDGT FOR DAMAGES & COSTS, INCL ATTY FEES; DECLARATION; POS, GRANT, NO OPP FILED. ATTY FEES GRANTED $2,085. ORDER SIGNED. REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD SERVED OCT-24-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 141 OSTEGO AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD
WRIT OF POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMEG,RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, OSCAR ROCHA, ODETTE CARMONA AKA ODETTE CARMONA
